raw_data.poc_idea:
AI-Powered Recruitment & Talent Intelligence Platform for LOTTE Vietnam

Enfue proposes to collaborate with selected LOTTE Group affiliates in Vietnam, including LOTTE Mart, LOTTERIA, LOTTE Cinema, LOTTE Hotel, and LOTTE Innovate, to run a 3–6 month Proof-of-Concept project focused on improving recruitment efficiency, candidate management, and talent data intelligence across the LOTTE ecosystem.

LOTTE operates across multiple high-volume, customer-facing sectors such as retail, F&B, cinema, hospitality, and technology. These businesses often require frequent recruitment for store staff, service staff, part-time workers, interns, office employees, and specialist roles. The proposed PoC will help LOTTE centralize applicants from different recruitment sources, improve collaboration between HR teams and hiring managers, and apply AI to support CV screening, candidate ranking, interview coordination, and recruitment analytics.

The PoC can begin with 2–3 selected LOTTE affiliates, for example LOTTE Mart, LOTTERIA, and LOTTE Cinema, focusing on a selected group of active hiring positions. Enfue will provide its recruitment platform to support the full hiring workflow, including job posting management, candidate collection, CV parsing, AI-assisted candidate matching, interview evaluation, recruitment pipeline tracking, and talent pool building.

The desired collaboration would include the following activities:

Centralized Candidate Collection
Enfue will help LOTTE collect applicants from multiple channels such as LOTTE career pages, job boards, social media campaigns, referral channels, and direct applications into one centralized recruitment workspace. This allows HR teams to avoid scattered Excel files, emails, and fragmented candidate tracking.
AI-Assisted CV Screening and Candidate Matching
Enfue will apply AI to parse CVs, structure candidate profiles, and support ranking candidates against job requirements. This is especially useful for high-volume roles where HR teams need to screen many applications quickly while maintaining quality.
Collaborative Hiring Workflow
HR teams, store managers, department heads, and interviewers from LOTTE affiliates can collaborate within Enfue through recruitment pipelines, candidate notes, interview feedback, evaluation forms, and status tracking. This helps reduce manual communication and improves transparency in the hiring process.
Talent Pool Development for LOTTE Ecosystem
Candidates who are not selected for one position may still be suitable for future roles across other LOTTE affiliates. Enfue will help LOTTE build a shared, searchable talent pool, allowing the group to reuse candidate data more effectively for future recruitment needs.
Recruitment Analytics and Talent Intelligence Dashboard
Enfue will provide dashboards to help LOTTE understand key hiring metrics such as number of applicants, source effectiveness, screening conversion, interview progress, time-to-shortlist, time-to-hire, and candidate pipeline quality. These insights can support better recruitment planning across LOTTE’s retail, F&B, cinema, hotel, and technology businesses.

Expected LOTTE Resources and Infrastructure Required

To carry out the PoC, Enfue would like to collaborate with selected LOTTE affiliates by using the following resources:

Active job openings from LOTTE Mart, LOTTERIA, LOTTE Cinema, LOTTE Hotel, or LOTTE Innovate
Access to recruitment workflows and feedback from LOTTE HR teams and hiring managers
Existing recruitment channels such as career pages, job board postings, social media campaigns, or referral sources
Sample historical recruitment data, where possible and compliant with data privacy requirements
Participation from LOTTE Innovate or relevant IT/security teams to review integration, data protection, and deployment requirements
Regular feedback sessions with HR and business users during the PoC period

Suggested PoC Timeline

Month 1: Discovery and Setup
Define pilot affiliates, selected job roles, recruitment workflow, user groups, success metrics, and data/privacy requirements. Configure Enfue for LOTTE’s recruitment process and onboard HR users.

Months 2–3: Pilot Execution
Run live recruitment campaigns through Enfue for selected roles. Centralize incoming applicants, apply AI CV parsing and matching, manage candidates through recruitment pipelines, and collect feedback from HR teams and hiring managers.

Months 4–6: Optimization and Expansion
Analyze pilot results, optimize workflows, improve AI matching based on feedback, expand to more roles or affiliates, and prepare a business case for larger-scale adoption across the LOTTE Vietnam ecosystem.

Expected PoC Outcomes

The PoC aims to deliver measurable improvements, including:

Centralizing applicant management for selected LOTTE recruitment campaigns
Reducing manual CV screening and candidate tracking time
Improving collaboration between HR teams and hiring managers
Shortening time-to-shortlist and improving visibility of recruitment progress
Creating a reusable talent pool for future hiring across LOTTE affiliates
Providing recruitment analytics to support data-driven hiring decisions

Through this collaboration, Enfue aims to demonstrate how an AI-powered recruitment platform can help LOTTE Vietnam improve hiring efficiency, strengthen talent management, and build a scalable recruitment infrastructure for its diverse business ecosystem.
raw_data.esg_impact:
Enfue addresses ESG impact mainly through the **Social** and **Governance** dimensions, with additional contribution to **Environmental** impact by reducing paper-based and fragmented recruitment operations.

From a **Social** perspective, Enfue helps organizations create a more accessible, transparent, and inclusive hiring process. Many candidates, especially young talents, frontline workers, fresh graduates, and applicants from different regions, may lose opportunities because recruitment processes are fragmented across emails, spreadsheets, job boards, and informal communication channels. Enfue centralizes candidate applications, structures candidate profiles, and helps HR teams manage applicants more fairly and consistently. With AI-assisted CV screening and candidate matching, hiring teams can process a higher number of applications more efficiently while still maintaining human decision-making. This can improve candidate experience, reduce missed opportunities, and help companies build stronger talent pools for future employment.

For LOTTE Vietnam, this impact is highly relevant because LOTTE operates across retail, F&B, cinema, hospitality, and technology, where hiring needs can be frequent, distributed, and high-volume. A PoC collaboration with LOTTE Mart, LOTTERIA, LOTTE Cinema, LOTTE Hotel, or LOTTE Innovate could help create better access to job opportunities for store staff, service staff, interns, graduates, and professional roles. Candidates who are not selected for one position could still be considered for other suitable roles within the broader LOTTE ecosystem, helping improve employment matching and reduce wasted recruitment effort.

From a **Governance** perspective, Enfue supports better recruitment transparency, data management, and decision accountability. The platform provides structured recruitment pipelines, candidate records, interview feedback, evaluation forms, status tracking, user roles, and activity history. This helps organizations reduce reliance on informal communication and manual files, while improving consistency, compliance, and visibility across the hiring process. For a large ecosystem like LOTTE, this can support stronger recruitment governance across multiple affiliates and locations.

From an **Environmental** perspective, Enfue can help reduce paper-based CV handling, printed evaluation forms, manual document storage, and unnecessary administrative work. By moving recruitment workflows into a digital platform, LOTTE teams can reduce paper usage and improve operational efficiency. In addition, better interview scheduling and centralized collaboration can help reduce unnecessary coordination, duplicated work, and repeated candidate processing.

A PoC collaboration with LOTTE could help create and measure this ESG impact in a practical way over 3–6 months. Enfue would work with selected LOTTE affiliates to run live recruitment campaigns through the platform, centralize applications, apply AI-assisted screening, support collaborative evaluations, and build a reusable talent pool. The PoC could measure ESG-related indicators such as:

* Number of candidates managed through a centralized and transparent process
* Reduction in manual CV screening and administrative workload
* Number of candidates reused or reconsidered for other LOTTE opportunities
* Improvement in time-to-shortlist and hiring visibility
* Reduction in paper-based recruitment documents
* Level of adoption by HR teams, hiring managers, and interviewers
* Improvement in structured feedback and decision tracking

Through this PoC, Enfue and LOTTE can demonstrate how digital recruitment infrastructure can create measurable ESG value by improving access to employment, strengthening fair and transparent hiring practices, reducing operational waste, and building a more data-driven talent ecosystem for LOTTE Vietnam.

raw_data.poc_idea:
Description of Desired Collaboration Projects (3–6 months)
Blackfrost proposes to co-develop and pilot bespoke AI workflow tools on our Elsa platform across four LOTTE business areas, using each affiliate's infrastructure and data.

AI/IT (LOTTE Innovate): 
Deploy Elsa on LOTTE Innovate's cloud and IT infrastructure to create a secure, integrated foundation for the pilots below.

Hospitality / Tourism (LOTTE Hotel, Properties, Cinema, World): 
Build a branded AI assistant for guest and customer interactions — bookings, enquiries, recommendations, and staff-facing operational support.

Logistics / Supply Chain (LOTTE Global Logistics): 
Develop an AI tool to streamline operations such as shipment tracking, document handling, and demand forecasting.

Smart City / PropTech (LOTTE E&C):
Build an AI tool to support property and construction workflows such as project documentation, contract review, and facilities enquiry handling.

Across all areas, LOTTE affiliates provide cloud infrastructure (via LOTTE Innovate), operational data, and team access, while Blackfrost delivers AI tool design, development, and integration. Our 3–6 month goal is concrete, tested pilots that demonstrate measurable efficiency gains and a clear path to wider rollout across the LOTTE Group.
raw_data.esg_impact:
Environmental: Blackfrost's AI tools replace paper-based, manual processes. Automating document handling and reporting to cut paper use and waste. A PoC digitising logistics or construction paperwork (LOTTE Global Logistics, LOTTE E&C) would improve resource efficiency and could extend to ESG reporting tools.

Social: Our platform widens access to AI through unlimited seats and no per-user charges. Within LOTTE, a PoC would free staff from repetitive work for higher-value tasks, improve customer service, and build AI capability among LOTTE's SME partners.

Governance: Elsa supports enterprise-grade security and auditable, role-based deployments. A PoC on LOTTE Innovate's infrastructure would demonstrate responsible, compliant AI use and give LOTTE a tested template for scaling across affiliates.

A 3–6 month PoC lets us prove these gains at real operational scale, LOTTE provides the infrastructure, data, and workflows; Blackfrost delivers the tools.

raw_data.esg_impact:
Environmental: L-Car Rental's station-based shared self-drive model lifts per-vehicle utilization, so fewer cars serve more people — cutting the embedded carbon, congestion, and parking demand of private ownership in dense HCMC; a single-SKU, well-maintained fleet also gives a clean path to phased EV adoption. Social: it democratizes car access — flexible, no-deposit, no-ownership-burden mobility for individuals and SMEs who can't justify buying a car — on a KYC-verified, GPS-tracked, insured fleet. Governance: every rental is formalized, audit-logged, insured, and PDPA-compliant, replacing informal/unsafe rentals.
A PoC with LOTTE amplifies all three: stations at LOTTE malls turn existing parking into shared-mobility hubs (with EV-charging potential), and LOTTE's scale accelerates the city's shift from car ownership to access.

raw_data.poc_idea:
LOTTE Engineering & Construction Vietnam: AI-Powered Safety Inspection for High-Rise and Large-Scale Construction Projects
Vietnam is experiencing one of Southeast Asia's most aggressive urban development booms, with Ho Chi Minh City and Hanoi seeing a surge in high-rise residential towers, commercial complexes, and large-scale infrastructure projects. LOTTE E&C Vietnam operates at the epicenter of this growth, managing multiple landmark construction and real estate developments — yet the local safety inspection industry remains almost entirely dependent on manual, labor-intensive, and subjective visual methods, with virtually no AI-powered digital alternative available in the market.
KO-MAPPER proposes deploying KO-Detect Pro at 2–3 active LOTTE E&C Vietnam construction sites or completed building complexes to:

Conduct drone/robot-based exterior facade and structural inspections, eliminating the need for dangerous rope-access or scaffolding-dependent manual surveys — particularly critical in Vietnam's high-rise construction environment where fall-related fatalities remain a leading occupational hazard
Automatically detect structural defects including cracks, exposed rebar, delamination, and efflorescence at 0.1mm precision with 93%+ AI accuracy, replacing subjective human judgment with objective, data-driven diagnostics
Auto-generate DXF drawings and internationally compliant safety inspection reports within 6.5 days (vs. 26 days under conventional methods), enabling LOTTE E&C Vietnam to meet both Vietnamese construction safety regulations (QCVN standards) and international investor-grade documentation requirements
Establish a time-series damage tracking baseline for ongoing lifecycle management of LOTTE's Vietnam real estate portfolio, directly supporting long-term asset value protection

Expected ROI for LOTTE E&C Vietnam: 83% reduction in inspection time, 82% reduction in inspection cost, and 96% reduction in worker risk exposure — while generating a fully auditable digital safety record that strengthens LOTTE's compliance posture with Vietnamese authorities and international partners, and differentiates LOTTE's developments as the safest, most transparently managed properties in the Vietnamese market.
raw_data.esg_impact:
KO-MAPPER's KO-Detect Pro directly addresses three of the most pressing ESG dimensions in Vietnam's rapidly urbanizing built environment:

Environmental: 
Vietnam is building at an unprecedented pace — yet the construction and infrastructure sector remains one of the country's largest sources of material waste, carbon emissions, and environmental degradation. Undetected structural deterioration in Vietnam's tropical climate (where heat, humidity, and monsoon conditions accelerate concrete corrosion and rebar exposure at rates far exceeding temperate markets) leads to premature structural failure, emergency demolition, and carbon-intensive reconstruction cycles. KO-Detect Pro's AI-driven early-stage defect detection and time-series predictive maintenance capabilities directly counter this trajectory — extending facility lifecycles, dramatically reducing unnecessary material consumption, and supporting Vietnam's commitment to its 2050 net-zero carbon neutrality target as pledged at COP26. A PoC with LOTTE E&C Vietnam would generate concrete, quantifiable data on lifecycle extension and carbon footprint reduction per building — data that LOTTE can leverage directly in its ESG disclosures and green financing applications, particularly as Vietnam's green bond market and ESG-linked real estate investment frameworks continue to mature.

Social: 
Vietnam's construction boom has come with a deeply troubling human cost. The country consistently ranks among Southeast Asia's highest for construction-site fatalities and occupational injuries, while high-profile structural failures — collapsing bridges, crumbling overpasses, and deteriorating apartment buildings in aging urban districts — continue to claim lives and displace communities. These failures disproportionately affect Vietnam's most vulnerable urban populations, who rely on aging public infrastructure and affordable housing that receives the least maintenance investment. KO-MAPPER's solution directly confronts this crisis by replacing dangerous, subjective manual inspections — conducted by workers on ropes, scaffolding, and aerial lifts in Vietnam's extreme heat and monsoon conditions — with safe, drone-based AI diagnostics that reduce occupational injury risk by up to 96% (based on RPN index). A LOTTE collaboration would amplify this social impact at scale: protecting construction workers across LOTTE's Vietnam project portfolio, delivering objectively safer living environments to thousands of LOTTE residential customers in Vietnam, and contributing to the Vietnamese government's stated national priority of reducing construction-related fatalities — positioning LOTTE as a genuine corporate citizen and safety leader in the Vietnamese market, not merely a foreign developer extracting value.

Governance:
Vietnam's regulatory environment for construction safety and facility management is undergoing rapid formalization, driven by the government's push to attract foreign direct investment, meet international financing standards (World Bank, ADB, IFC), and align with ASEAN-wide infrastructure governance frameworks. International investors and development finance institutions increasingly require rigorous, auditable safety documentation as a precondition for project financing — a requirement that Vietnam's largely manual, paper-based inspection system currently cannot reliably fulfill. KO-Detect Pro's automated, tamper-resistant digital inspection reports and time-series audit trails provide LOTTE Vietnam with a governance framework that simultaneously satisfies Vietnamese regulatory requirements and meets the documentation standards demanded by international capital markets. By integrating KO-MAPPER's platform across its Vietnam facility portfolio, LOTTE would establish the most transparent, digitally governed real estate and construction operation in Vietnam — a decisive competitive advantage in attracting ESG-conscious international investors, securing green financing at preferential rates, and building the institutional trust with Vietnamese authorities that underpins long-term market leadership.

A PoC collaboration between KO-MAPPER and LOTTE in Vietnam would not merely validate technology in a new market — it would create a globally replicable model for how multinational conglomerates can operationalize ESG commitments in high-growth, high-risk emerging market construction environments, generating both measurable impact metrics and a compelling ESG narrative that strengthens LOTTE's sustainability reporting, investor relations, and social license to operate across Southeast Asia.

raw_data.esg_impact:
Giải pháp màng sinh học từ MFC vỏ trấu và tinh bột sắn góp phần giải quyết các vấn đề về Môi trường, Xã hội và Quản trị (ESG). Về môi trường, sản phẩm tận dụng phụ phẩm nông nghiệp có giá trị thấp như vỏ trấu để tạo ra vật liệu phân hủy sinh học, góp phần giảm rác thải nhựa và thúc đẩy kinh tế tuần hoàn. Về xã hội, giải pháp tạo thêm giá trị cho phụ phẩm nông nghiệp, mở ra cơ hội tăng thu nhập cho người nông dân và nâng cao nhận thức cộng đồng về tiêu dùng bền vững. Về quản trị, sản phẩm hỗ trợ doanh nghiệp thực hiện các mục tiêu phát triển bền vững, giảm dấu chân môi trường trong chuỗi cung ứng và đáp ứng các tiêu chuẩn ESG ngày càng được quan tâm.

Việc hợp tác thử nghiệm (PoC) với LOTTE sẽ giúp đánh giá tính khả thi của sản phẩm trong điều kiện thực tế, đo lường hiệu quả thay thế bao bì nhựa truyền thống và thu thập dữ liệu về mức độ giảm phát thải, giảm rác thải nhựa cũng như khả năng chấp nhận của người tiêu dùng. Kết quả PoC sẽ là cơ sở để mở rộng ứng dụng giải pháp trong hệ sinh thái bán lẻ của LOTTE, từ đó tạo ra tác động ESG rõ rệt và bền vững hơn.

raw_data.poc_idea:
PrivOS proposes to deploy its AI Operating System platform at selected LOTTE Vietnam affiliates over a 3–6 month PoC, enabling LOTTE teams and AI agents to collaborate inside a single, self-hosted workspace - with all operational data remaining on LOTTE's own servers.


+Phase 1 PoC - 3 Target Affiliates: PrivOS will focus the initial PoC on three affiliates, each representing a distinct industry vertical. Once measurable impact is demonstrated, the same platform and configurations will be replicated across other LOTTE Group entities in Vietnam and the region.


+Affiliate
Infrastructure & Data Involved
LOTTE Mart Vietnam
Server infrastructure, POS/inventory data, operations team workflows
LOTTE Hotel Hanoi / HCMC
HR systems, guest service processes, property management data
LOTTE Finance Vietnam
Compliance document workflows, internal approval systems


+Month 1–2 - Platform Deployment & Workflow Design:PrivOS is deployed on LOTTE's private cloud or on-premise infrastructure (self-hosted, zero data sent to external vendors). One PrivOS Room is configured per affiliate - each Room combines team chat, a Kanban/spreadsheet task board, file storage, and AI agents sharing the same operational context. PrivOS ships with tailored MCP Apps - including HRM App, CRM App, and Marketing App - which are activated and customized to each affiliate's specific workflows during this phase. Beyond these built-in apps, PrivOS's MCP App framework is fully extensible: LOTTE's own teams can build additional internal-use apps - procurement dashboards, shift scheduling tools, compliance trackers, internal knowledge bases, or any bespoke workflow - directly on top of PrivOS without external vendors. Each department can also configure its own AI Agent Bots to serve department-specific workflows - the HR team's bot handles employee queries and payroll reminders, the operations team's bot monitors inventory triggers, the compliance team's bot tracks document review queues - all running in their respective Rooms with isolated context and permissions. Where LOTTE's existing internal systems (POS, PMS, core banking) require direct integration, custom MCP Apps are built to run entirely behind LOTTE's firewall with no public IP or port forwarding required.


+Month 2–5 - Live Pilot Across 3 Use Cases:


1. LOTTE Mart - AI-Powered Retail Operations Hub: Large-scale retail operations commonly face coordination gaps between inventory data, supplier communication, and operations teams - where information exists in separate systems and delays accumulate through manual hand-offs. The PoC Month 1 discovery phase will map LOTTE Mart's current workflows together with LOTTE's operations team to identify the highest-impact automation points.


+PrivOS Smart List unifies inventory tracking, supplier tasks, and daily operations reporting into a single structured view that AI agents can act on. When trigger thresholds are met (configurable: low stock, overdue tasks, supplier delays), AI Bot Agents surface one-click action buttons ([Reorder] [Assign to Manager] [Escalate]) directly inside the team chat - no tool-switching required.


+PrivOS CRM App (core available, customized for LOTTE): Centralizes customer and supplier relationship management - handling incoming inquiries, tracking interaction history, and enabling AI-assisted responses to customers and suppliers, all within the same Room where operations tasks are managed.


+PrivOS Marketing App (core available, customized for LOTTE): Equips the marketing team with built-in AI skills for content creation and campaign execution - content marketing, campaign planning, and other customizable marketing workflows - without switching to external tools.


+Custom MCP App - POS & Inventory Bridge (where approved): Surfaces live sales and stock data from LOTTE Mart's existing POS system as a real-time KPI tab inside the Room - running entirely within LOTTE's own network, no data leaving their servers.


+Expected outcome: reduction in operational response time, to be baselined during discovery phase and measured against PoC results.

2. LOTTE Hotel - AI Staff Management & Guest Intelligence: Hotel operations involve recurring coordination-heavy workflows - managing staff attendance, payroll, and compliance across departments while simultaneously handling guest experience across multiple channels. The PoC discovery phase will confirm which workflows create the most friction for LOTTE Hotel's HR and operations teams.


+PrivOS HRM App (core available, customized for LOTTE - applicable across all LOTTE Vietnam affiliates): Manages the full employee lifecycle - staff check-in/check-out attendance tracking, payroll calculation, tax computation, social insurance, and consolidated cost reporting across departments. While deployed at LOTTE Hotel as the PoC entry point, the HRM App is designed to scale across all LOTTE Vietnam affiliates - giving LOTTE Group the option to operate a single unified HR system for Mart, Hotel, and Finance operations in Vietnam - rather than managing separate systems per entity.


+PrivOS CRM App (core available, customized for LOTTE): Manages guest relationships and service communication - tracking guest profiles, interaction history, and enabling AI-assisted responses to guest inquiries across channels, all within the hotel Room.


+PrivOS Marketing App (core available, customized for LOTTE): Equips the hotel's marketing team with AI skills for content creation and campaign execution - guest engagement campaigns, promotional content, seasonal offers - with customizable marketing workflows built directly into the PrivOS ecosystem.


3. LOTTE Finance - AI Compliance Document Processing: Financial institutions face growing pressure on compliance document volumes - loan applications, credit assessments, regulatory filings - where manual review creates bottlenecks and inconsistency risk. The PoC will scope the specific document workflows at LOTTE Finance that carry the highest review load.


+PrivOS Documents & Files serves as a centralized, version-controlled compliance repository with AI Auto Parse. When documents are submitted, AI Bot Agents run configurable compliance checklists and present structured decisions - [Approve] [Flag for Review] [Escalate] - as interactive buttons in the compliance officer's chat room. Every AI action is logged and auditable; human approval is required at each decision gate.


+PrivOS CRM App (core available, customized for LOTTE): Manages the client relationship layer for LOTTE Finance - tracking applicant profiles, communication history, and enabling AI-assisted responses to client inquiries throughout the loan and credit review process, replacing fragmented email and spreadsheet tracking.


+Custom MCP App - Core Banking Bridge (where approved by IT governance): Syncs loan and credit application status from LOTTE Finance's internal core banking system directly into PrivOS Smart Lists - running inside LOTTE's network with no data leaving their environment.


+Expected outcome: reduction in manual document review time per case, to be baselined during discovery and measured against PoC results.


+Month 5–6 - Measurement & Scale Roadmap: Joint evaluation of KPIs: staff hours saved per week, number of legacy SaaS tools replaced, error rate reduction, MCP integrations deployed, and adoption rate across each affiliate. PrivOS and LOTTE co-author a scale-up roadmap for full Vietnam deployment and potential replication across LOTTE's regional operations in Asia - using the same self-hosted architecture with zero re-platforming.
raw_data.esg_impact:
Environmental (E): PrivOS consolidates 5–7 separate SaaS platforms (chat, project management, file storage, CRM, automation, AI) into a single self-hosted system. For LOTTE Vietnam, this means significantly fewer redundant cloud servers, reduced energy consumption across data centers, and lower digital infrastructure overhead. AI Auto Parse and digital compliance workflows at LOTTE Finance directly reduce paper-based document processing, supporting the paperless operations direction that enterprises across industries are actively pursuing.
PoC impact: LOTTE Mart, Hotel, and Finance each eliminate multiple cloud SaaS subscriptions, consolidating onto LOTTE's own private servers - reducing dependence on energy-intensive third-party data centers.


+Social (S):PrivOS is built on the core philosophy of AI Augmentation, Not Replacement. AI agents handle repetitive, error-prone tasks so LOTTE's employees can focus on higher-value, creative, and relationship-driven work - directly improving employee wellbeing and job quality. The no-code AgentFlow builder democratizes AI - any department head or team lead at LOTTE can design and deploy AI workflows without engineering resources, building practical AI literacy across LOTTE's Vietnamese workforce aligned with PrivOS's 6-level AI Maturity Model (L0 → L6).

PoC impact: LOTTE Hotel's onboarding automation reduces administrative burden on HR staff. LOTTE Mart's operations automation removes repetitive manual reporting from frontline staff. LOTTE Finance's compliance automation reduces cognitive overload on compliance officers.


+Governance (G):PrivOS enforces a 6-layer Sandbox security model: room-scoped data isolation, explicit permission boundaries per agent, full audit trails of every AI action, human-in-the-loop approval gates, and rate limiting to prevent runaway automation. Data sovereignty is the cornerstone - all operational data stays on LOTTE's own servers, eliminating vendor dependency and ensuring LOTTE meets its enterprise data governance obligations.
PoC impact: LOTTE Finance's compliance workflow - with [Approve] [Flag] [Escalate] gates in every AI-processed document - demonstrates responsible AI governance in a regulated industry. Every AI decision is logged, reviewable, and reversible.


+How the PoC Creates This Impact:The 3–6 month collaboration creates a documented, measurable case study of responsible enterprise AI adoption in Vietnam - across retail, hospitality, and finance. This gives LOTTE a replicable governance framework for expanding AI responsibly to all affiliates and regional markets, positioning both LOTTE and PrivOS as leaders in ethical, sovereign AI deployment in Southeast Asia.

raw_data.poc_idea: We propose a PoC combining SantaPocket’s smart lockers and our "Market" feature with LOTTE Mart. Customers can order groceries/products via the app, and LOTTE Mart will fulfill and stock them directly into SantaPocket lockers located in residential buildings. This creates a seamless, contactless O2O shopping experience, expanding LOTTE Mart’s retail reach while optimizing last-mile delivery. We can also integrate with LOTTE Global Logistics to improve delivery efficiency and LOTTE Innovate for seamless IT/AI integration.
raw_data.esg_impact: SantaPocket directly addresses Environmental (E) and Social (S) impacts through our smart locker ecosystem and integrated features like "Market" (ordering and delivering goods directly to lockers) and "Charity". By centralizing package deliveries and consolidating shopping demands, we optimize courier routes and eliminate multiple delivery attempts, drastically cutting down urban traffic congestion and carbon emissions (E). Socially, our "Market" feature provides ultimate shopping convenience and contactless safety by allowing users to pick up their orders directly from the lockers at their own convenience. Additionally, our "Charity" feature allows citizens to easily donate items through the locker network, promoting a circular economy and supporting community welfare (S). Collaborating with LOTTE will allow us to scale this green and socially impactful logistics model across their massive infrastructure.
